nasb.text: So when Aaron and all the sons of Israel saw Moses, behold, the skin of his face shone, and they were afraid to come near him.

esv.text: Aaron and all the people of Israel saw Moses, and behold, the skin of his face shone, and they were afraid to come near him.

cnv.text: 亞倫和全體以色列人看見了摩西，見他臉上發光，就害怕接近他。

ccb.text: 亚伦和所有的以色列百姓看见摩西脸上发光，都不敢走近他。
